column1: # Maps Oracle item code prefixes to material categories.
#   - item_code_prefix matches the FIRST segment of the Oracle item code
#     (everything before the first dash).  Example: "COT" matches "COT-2024-001".
#   - First matching row wins — put more specific prefixes before general ones.
#   - Lines starting with # are comments and are ignored.
#   - To add a new material: append one row
